Jiangsu Shengzhitong Industrial Development Co., Ltd. presents a profile of a highly generalized trading and 'industrial development' shell that has been blatantly misclassified by the registry system as an 'Electronic Device Manufacturer'. Established in 2008 with a fully paid-in capital of 5 Million RMB but currently reporting 0 insured employees, its true nature is revealed by its former name ('Jiangsu Laichuang Trading Co., Ltd.') and its rural registered address ('No. 5 Weijiaweizi, Qiancang Village') in Liuhe District, Nanjing. Rather than manufacturing high-tech electronics, its explicit business scope is anchored in the low-tech production and sales of metal shelving (racks), supplemented by general domestic trade, computer/telecom equipment leasing, and vague business consulting services. It operates as an asset-light trading intermediary or a localized metal fabrication workshop.
